bird.name: 白額隼
bird.summary: 白額隼（學名：Microhierax latifrons）是猛禽類隼科的一種，也是最小型的猛禽，是婆羅洲沙巴地區的特有鳥類。 牠們長15-17cm，重35-65G，與麻雀的大小差不多。

locations.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
locations.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普（英語：Richard Bowdler Sharpe，1847年11月22日—1909年12月25日）是一位英國動物學家兼鳥類學家，於大英博物館擔任鳥類標本的策展人。在其職涯裡，夏普出版了一些有關鳥類的專著，並整理出博…

locations.name: 婆罗洲
locations.summary: 加里曼丹岛（印尼語：Kalimantan）（星馬称婆罗洲岛，台湾称婆罗洲（馬來語：Borneo））是东南亚马来群岛中部的一座岛屿，面积743,330平方公里，是世界第三大岛，僅次於格陵蘭及新幾內亞，同時是亞洲第一大島。婆羅洲全境由印尼、馬…

locations.name: 加里曼丹
locations.summary: 加里曼丹（印尼語：Kalimantan）是印尼在婆罗洲岛南部的属地，印尼人稱整個婆羅洲島為加里曼丹島。加里曼丹地區本來是單獨的一個省，之後逐漸分成五個省，即东加里曼丹省、南加里曼丹省、中加里曼丹省、西加里曼丹省和北加里曼丹省。加里曼丹北部…

locations.summary: The Mongolian Ornithological Society), was founded in 1999 in the capital city, Ulaanbaatar.

relations.subject: 白額隼
relations.evidence: Described by the British ornithologist Richard Bowdler Sharpe in 1879, it is endemic to Borneo, where it is found in Sarawak, Sabah, and extreme northeastern Kalimantan

relations.subject: 白額隼
relations.evidence: Threats to the species include deforestation, forest fires, and the cage-bird trade
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 白額隼
relations.evidence: The white-fronted falconet is classified as being near threatened by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) on the IUCN Red List, due to its small range, a moderately small population that is declining, and habitat loss within its range. It is also listed on Appendix II of CITES. The species' total population is estimated to be 15,000–30,000 total individuals, out of which 10,000–19,999 are adults
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 白額隼
relations.evidence: The white-fronted falconet is classified as being near threatened by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) on the IUCN Red List, due to its small range, a moderately small population that is declining, and habitat loss within its range. It is also listed on Appendix II of CITES. The species' total population is estimated to be 15,000–30,000 total individuals, out of which 10,000–19,999 are adults
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
